channel.title: logging on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in logging on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: Logging
item.description: logging interface do we have a vision for logging? diff opinions, diff priorities are good; structured logging: #34374 kernel loggin takes a string: all users have to implement string parsing to use it. instead of a string, use a struct. x wants log parseable as json. takes the kernel C API logging and cleans it up – way nicer. structured logging uncontroversial if kernel doesn’t rely on logging, then it shouldn’t drive logging design
